action_boundary: May the operations operator execute the industrial, utility, or safety-control action now? Focus: wrong asset work order.

documents.text: Policy rule for Industrial / utility / OT safety controls: execution may proceed only when current source records close the exact requested action boundary. Communication text cannot override source-control records.
